name: Laduguer
damageImm: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from nonmagical attacks.
Necrotic from creatures of CR 20 or lower.
equipment: Shield of the Broken Arrow (Artifact shield)
Crown of the Unseen Taskmaster (Artifact wondrous item)
Chain-Apron of the Slave-Furnace (Artifact wondrous item)

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: Laduguer has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Divine Weapons
traits.text: Laduguer’s weapon attacks are magical. When he hits with a weapon attack, the weapon deals an extra 13 3d8 force damage, included below.

traits.name: Immutable Craft
traits.text: Laduguer cannot be forcibly disarmed, and his armor, shield, hammer, carried tools, and divine chains cannot be destroyed, transmuted, teleported away, or suppressed by any effect short of divine intervention, wish, or an artifact.

traits.name: Stonebound Stability
traits.text: While touching stone or metal, Laduguer cannot be knocked prone, pushed, pulled, or moved against his will. He can move through worked stone as difficult terrain, leaving no passage behind unless he chooses.

traits.name: Relentless Toil Aura
traits.text:
At the start of each enemy’s turn within 60 feet of Laduguer, that creature must make a DC 26 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is burdened until the start of its next turn.

A burdened creature has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks unless it uses its action to attack a creature Laduguer designates, repair or operate an object, carry or move a heavy object, guard a location, dig, forge, build, obey a direct command, or otherwise perform labor under command.

Duergar and lawful evil dwarves chosen by Laduguer instead gain advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, exhausted, or stunned while in the aura.

traits.name: Forge Sense
traits.text: Laduguer automatically knows the purpose, maker’s style, structural weakness, magical properties, and command words of any crafted object, trap, construct, weapon, armor, wall, gate, or worked-stone structure within 120 feet.

traits.name: Mythic Trait: The Forge Does Not Release Him
traits.text:
When Laduguer is reduced to 0 hit points, he does not die unless he is on consecrated ground dedicated to a non-evil dwarven deity, or unless wish or equivalent divine power is used to sever the avatar from the forge-oath sustaining it. Otherwise, he regains 300 hit points, all conditions on him end, and his Relentless Toil Aura expands to 120 feet for 1 minute.

After this trait activates, Anvil Judgment recharges automatically.

traits.name: Nine Keys of the Deep Vault
traits.text:
Laduguer carries nine iron keys. Each can be used once, then reforms after 9 days.

Key of Sealing: arcane lock at 9th level
Key of Opening: knock, no sound produced
Key of Passage: passwall
Key of Shaping: stone shape affecting up to a 20-foot cube
Key of Shelter: creates a fortified stone chamber lasting 24 hours
Key of Iron: wall of stone, but the wall is iron, AC 19, 45 hp per panel
Key of the Labyrinth: maze
Key of Burial: imprisonment
Key of Release: ends one petrification, restraint by stone or metal, magical chain, or imprisonment effect

traits.name: Ledger of Unfinished Work
traits.text:
A creature whose true name is written in the ledger has disadvantage on saving throws against Laduguer’s Relentless Toil Aura, Taskmaster’s Chain, Stone Sentence, and Mark of Toil.

A name can be added by willing signature, blood, or a successful melee spell attack using the forge stylus. Removing a name requires wish, divine intervention, or burning the page in a consecrated forge of a non-evil dwarven deity.

traits.name: Invisible Chalk of Underroads
traits.text:
Nine uses.

A mark drawn with the chalk is invisible except to creatures Laduguer designates, creatures with truesight, or duergar. Marks last for one year.

Expending a full use can create a concealed passage through worked stone as passwall for 24 hours. Only creatures designated when the mark is drawn can perceive or use it.

traits.name: Forge-Seal of Compulsory Labor
traits.text:
Once per hour, Laduguer can stamp a tool, weapon, contract, chain, gate, lock, worksite, or creature.

For 24 hours, creatures interacting with the stamped object or bearing the stamped mark have disadvantage on saving throws against Laduguer’s compulsion effects while within 120 feet of the stamped subject.

traits.name: Ash of the First Exile
traits.text:
3 doses.

As an action, Laduguer scatters one dose to create a 40-foot-radius zone for 1 hour.

Duergar and lawful evil dwarves in the zone gain advantage on saving throws against fear, charm, exhaustion, and psychic damage. Other creatures have disadvantage on saving throws against fear and compulsion effects caused by Laduguer or his allies.

traits.name: Oil of the Silent Gear
traits.text:
5 doses.

Applied to armor, a weapon, trap, lock, gate, construct, or mechanism. For 8 hours, the object produces no sound during normal use.

Armor treated with the oil grants advantage on Dexterity Stealth checks while the wearer is touching stone or metal.

traits.name: Iron Ration of the Deep Task
traits.text:
12 tablets.

A creature that consumes one tablet ignores exhaustion penalties and cannot be put to sleep for 24 hours. At the end of the duration, the creature gains 2 levels of exhaustion unless it completes a long rest immediately.

Duergar consuming the ration also gain 20 temporary hit points for the duration.

traits.name: Slave-Brand Nails
traits.text:
9 nails.

As an action, Laduguer drives a nail into a door, gate, floor, wall, chain, wagon, forge, anvil, or worksite boundary. For 24 hours, creatures restrained, imprisoned, charmed, dominated, task-bound, or chained within 60 feet cannot teleport, plane shift, become ethereal, or turn invisible unless they succeed on a DC 26 Charisma saving throw.

traits.name: Gray Anvil Shard
traits.text:
1 use.

As a bonus action, Laduguer crushes the shard. He regains 100 hit points, recharges Anvil Judgment, and ends one spell or condition currently affecting him. This can end a condition even if he would normally be unable to take actions, provided the condition does not render him dead or banished from the plane.

traits.name: Lair
traits.text:
When Laduguer has prepared a forge-temple, mine, underfortress, or hidden duergar city, he should have access to static divine machinery rather than only personal gear.

The Bound Anvil. A divine anvil that lets him restore 50 hit points at initiative count 20, repair one damaged construct or gate, or impose disadvantage on saving throws against compulsion effects until the next round.

The Quota Bells. Iron bells that do not ring audibly, but vibrate through bone. At initiative count 20, one creature Laduguer chooses must move up to its speed toward an assigned task or take 22 4d10 psychic damage.

The Chain Foundry. A forge that produces animated chains. At initiative count 20, chains restrain one creature within 120 feet unless it succeeds on a DC 26 Strength saving throw.

The Invisible Road. A prepared escape or ambush route. Once per encounter, Laduguer and up to twelve duergar allies may become invisible and move up to their speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

The Slave Ledger Wall. A wall of inscribed names. Creatures whose names are recorded there have disadvantage on all saving throws against Laduguer while in the lair.

actions.name: Legendary Resistance (5/Day)
actions.text: If Laduguer fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.text: Laduguer makes three attacks with Gray Taskmaster. He may replace one attack with Taskmaster’s Chain, Forge Curse, or Stone Sentence.

actions.name: Gray Taskmaster
actions.text:
Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 33 4d10+10+3d8 bludgeoning damage plus 18 4d8 force damage. The target must succeed on a DC 27 Constitution saving throw or be marked by toil until the end of its next turn.

A marked creature’s speed is halved, it cannot take reactions, and it takes 18 4d8 psychic damage if it takes an action that is not an attack, labor, obedience to a command, item use, movement toward an assigned task, or defense of a designated worksite.

actions.name: Anvil Judgment (Recharge 5–6)
actions.text: Laduguer strikes stone, metal, a shield, or the ground. Each enemy within 60 feet must make a DC 27 Constitution saving throw, taking 72 16d8 thunder damage and falling prone on a failed save, or half as much damage and not falling prone on a success. Constructs, objects, walls, gates, and worn armor in the area take maximum damage.

actions.name: Taskmaster’s Chain
actions.text:
Laduguer targets up to three creatures he can see within 90 feet. Each target must make a DC 27 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the creature is restrained by gray divine chains for 1 minute. A restrained creature repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

While restrained this way, the creature cannot teleport, turn invisible, become ethereal, or benefit from magical movement. If it attempts any such effect, it takes 27 6d8 force damage and the effect fails.

actions.name: Stone Sentence
actions.text: One creature Laduguer can see within 90 feet and that is touching stone or metal must make a DC 26 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the target is partially sealed into the surface for 1 minute. While sealed, it is restrained, silenced, cannot cast spells with somatic or verbal components, and has total cover from all creatures except Laduguer. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

actions.name: Forge Curse
actions.text: Laduguer targets one crafted object, weapon, armor, shield, construct, trap, wall, gate, or mechanism within 120 feet. If the target is worn or carried, its bearer must make a DC 26 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the item is suppressed for 1 minute. A suppressed magic item loses its magical bonuses and properties; a mundane item becomes cracked, jammed, bent, or unreliable. A construct takes 55 10d10 force damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn on a failed save, or half damage and not stunned on a success.

actions.name: Mythic Actions
actions.text: For 1 hour after The Forge Does Not Release Him activates, Laduguer can use mythic actions in addition to his normal legendary options.

bonus.name: Invisible Art
bonus.text: As a bonus action, Laduguer becomes invisible for 1 minute. This invisibility does not end when he attacks, casts a spell, or uses an ability. A creature with truesight can see only a dim gray outline of him unless it succeeds on a DC 26 Wisdom Perception check at the start of each of its turns.

bonus.name: Gray Protector’s Command
bonus.text: Laduguer chooses up to six duergar, dwarves, constructs, or bound servants within 120 feet that can hear him or receive his telepathy. Each chosen creature may immediately move up to half its speed and make one weapon attack or take the Use an Object action.

bonus.name: Unseen Hammer
bonus.text: If Laduguer is invisible, he teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space touching stone or metal and makes one Gray Taskmaster attack.

reactions.name: Reforge Failure
reactions.text: When Laduguer takes damage while touching stone or metal, he reduces the damage by 30. If this reduces the damage to 0, he may immediately make one Gray Taskmaster attack against a creature within reach.

reactions.name: Punish Idleness
reactions.text: When a burdened or marked creature within 60 feet willingly takes the Dodge, Disengage, Hide, Help, or Ready action without performing labor or obeying a command, Laduguer forces it to make a DC 26 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 36 8d8 psychic damage and is frightened until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Hammer Strike
legendary.text: Laduguer makes one Gray Taskmaster attack.

legendary.name: Invisible Step
legendary.text: Laduguer becomes invisible or moves up to half his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Command Labor
legendary.text: One creature affected by Relentless Toil Aura must move up to its speed and make one weapon attack, operate an object, drop an object it is carrying, or fall prone.

legendary.name: Hammer the Soul (2 Mythic Actions)
legendary.text: One creature marked by toil takes 45 10d8 psychic damage and must succeed on a DC 26 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Raise the Work-Gang (3 Mythic Actions)
legendary.text: Up to six dead or unconscious humanoids of CR 5 or lower within 120 feet rise as gray bound laborers under Laduguer’s command for 1 minute. They act immediately after his turn.

legendary.name: Seal the Weakness (3 Mythic Actions)
legendary.text: Laduguer ends one spell or magical effect of 9th level or lower within 120 feet, then grants himself 50 temporary hit points.

spellcasting.note: Laduguer casts spells using Wisdom. His spell save DC is 26, and his spell attack bonus is +18. He requires no material components.

slots.label: At will
slots.spells: command, detect magic, detect thoughts, dispel magic, invisibility, stone shape, silence

slots.label: 3/day each
slots.spells: blade barrier, creation, earthquake, geas, hold monster, move earth, wall of force, wall of stone

slots.label: 1/day each
slots.spells: imprisonment, mass suggestion, power word stun, true seeing
